nft.heroLead: Explore curated drops, collections, and listings with multi-chain filters (demo data). Live trading follows on-chain contracts and platform rules.
nft.how1d: Find items or collections by chain, category, sort, and search.
nft.how2d: Production supports custodial and external wallets; demo needs no on-chain signature.
nft.how3d: Buy-now and auctions; after a fill, view holdings under Orders › NFT orders.

portal.bannerBody: Holdings and buy/bid history live under Orders › NFT orders (separate from spot/futures).

ordersPage.intro: Shows NFTs held in your account and buy/sell/bid history (demo). Production follows on-chain ownership and APIs.
ordersPage.bullet1: Holdings lists items currently owned; they disappear after transfer or sale.
ordersPage.bullet2: Orders includes buy-now fills and auction bids; outbid/cancelled states are labeled.
ordersPage.heading: NFT holdings & orders

nft.searchPh: Search by name, collection, or creator

rules.title: Rules & risk (demo)
rules.i1: NFTs are volatile digital assets; only participate if you understand the risks.
rules.i2: Demo mode is not connected to mainnet; buys/bids are simulated.
rules.i3: Production may require KYC and compliance with local laws.
rules.i4: Royalties, creator fees, and gas follow live parameters.
rules.short: Demo purchases are not charged; production uses escrow contracts and order flows.

nft.disclaimer: Demo UI; images are placeholders and unrelated to real projects. Replace with your CDN and on-chain metadata before launch.

detail.creator: Creator
detail.feeHint: Includes ~{fee}% service fee · {roy}% creator royalty (see checkout for details)

trade.title: Confirm order
trade.note: Total includes price, platform fee, royalty, and estimated gas. Demo does not broadcast on-chain. Production follows finalized orders.
trade.agree: I have read and agree to the risk notice and platform rules (demo)
trade.successSub: In production, track status under Orders › NFT orders or in your wallet.

toast.needLogin: Please log in to buy or bid
